search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` | head 1 | addinfo | eval selection_duration=strftime(info_min_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") . " - " . strftime(info_max_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | table selection_duration

`netflow_search_rule_20067` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(dest_ip, dest_ip, l_dest_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by dest_ip,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | fillnull value="" dest_host | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip dest_ip l_dest_host _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by exp_ip dest_ip l_dest_host nfo_hostname | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 20 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table exp_ip_name dest_ip l_dest_host "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename l_dest_host as "Destination Host"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module â€ś10067: Top Traffic Monitorâ€ť (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO â€śNetwork Traffic and Devices Monitorâ€ť Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
